<?php return [ /* |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Default Filesystem Disk |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Here you may specify the default filesystem disk that should be used | by the framework. The "local" disk, as well as a variety of cloud | based disks are available to your application for file storage. | */ 'default' => env('FILESYSTEM_DISK', 'local'), /* |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Filesystem Disks |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Below you may configure as many filesystem disks as necessary, and you | may even configure multiple disks for the same driver. Examples for | most supported storage drivers are configured here for reference. | | Supported drivers: "local", "ftp", "sftp", "s3" | */ 'disks' => [ 'local' => [ 'driver' => 'local', 'root' => storage_path('app/private'), 'serve' => true, 'throw' => false, 'report' => false, ], 'public' => [ 'driver' => 'local', 'root' => storage_path('app/public'), 'url' => rtrim((string) env('APP_URL'), '/').'/storage', 'visibility' => 'public', 'throw' => false, 'report' => false, ], 's3' => [ 'driver' => 's3', 'key' => env('AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID'), 'secret' => env('AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY'), 'region' => env('AWS_DEFAULT_REGION'), 'bucket' => env('AWS_BUCKET'), 'url' => env('AWS_URL'), 'endpoint' => env('AWS_ENDPOINT'), 'use_path_style_endpoint' => env('AWS_USE_PATH_STYLE_ENDPOINT', false), 'throw' => false, 'report' => false, ], ], /* |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Symbolic Links |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Here you may configure the symbolic links that will be created when the | `storage:link` Artisan command is executed. The array keys should be | the locations of the links and the values should be their targets. | */ 'links' => [ public_path('storage') => storage_path('app/public'), ], ];
